articles.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
articles.description: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.
articles.summary: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry

articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Google’s Pixel event is set for August 12
articles.description: Google's upcoming event in August will introduce new Pixel devices.
articles.summary: Google has announced a Pixel event for August 1 endorsing the introduction of novel Pixel smartphones.
points: The Pixel series is Google's mainstay in its range, with regular updates and new devices being released to maintain market competitiveness.
Google anticipates significant hardware innovations for their upcoming Pixel lineup expected at the August event.
Previous iterations of Pixels have included unique features like improved camera technology; thus setting high expectations among consumers.
articles.insight: The consistent release cycle and improvements in Google's hardware could signal sustained leadership or potential market saturation challenges for the company. The anticipated innovations suggest that staying ahead of industry trends will be crucial, especially as competitors like Apple continue to advance their technology.

articles.title: Figma acquires team behind a vibe-coding app
articles.description: The Y Combinator-backed company started a vibe-coding platform and later built an agent-creation product.
articles.summary: Figma has recently acquired the team behind a previously independent vibing coding app along with their own innovative tool for creating agents.
points: The Y Combinator-backed company Figma acquires startup Teamwork, which developed 'vibe' - an indie design platform and later built its agent creation product called Agentmaker.

Following the acquisition of both products by integrating them into a unified tool set within one app as well as enhancing user experience in creating custom agents with AI-powered tools is expected to impact future trends across industries beyond design and creative agency worlds, such as healthcare or education.
The acquisition of Agentmaker has been completed via a $10 million funding round led by Y Combinator General partner Drew Houston; the team behind vibe received an undisclosed amount.
articles.insight: This recent acquisition signals Figma's intent to extend its market reach beyond design software, potentially transforming various industries through AI-powered creative tools. It could lead towards a new era of digital collaboration and automation across sectors that can benefit from custom agent creation.

articles.title: Netflix dabbles in shorter video content with its new set of publisher deals with Variety, others
articles.description: Netflix is bringing 2- to 20-minute videos to its platform through new partnerships with digital publishers, including Rolling Stone and Variety.
articles.summary: Netflix is bringing 2- to 20-minute videos to its platform through new partnerships with digital publishers, including Rolling Stone and Variety

articles.title: Hacked, leaked, and held for ransom: The worst breaches of 2026 so far
articles.description: From a massive DOGE data breach and the hacking of critical energy and water systems to the hack of an FBI surveillance system, here are the most damaging security incidents and data breaches of 2026.
articles.summary: The article details a series of significant cybersecurity incidents in 2026 including large-scale data breaches at financial institutions involving DOGE assets and critical infrastructure hacks affecting energy and water systems.
points: A massive DOGE (Digital One Global Ecosystem) asset theft highlighted serious security vulnerabilities within cryptocurrency networks, causing widespread economic disruption.

Critical infrastructure in several regions was compromised through sophisticated cyber-attacks targeting energy grids and water treatment facilities, leading to safety concerns and operational downtime.
The FBI surveillance system faced a security breach that resulted in the exposure of sensitive law enforcement data.
articles.insight: These incidents underscore an escalating threat landscape where not only financial assets but also critical national infrastructure are increasingly targeted by highly sophisticated and persistent cyber actors, posing serious risks to security and economic stability. The FBI breach highlights vulnerabilities in government agencies' data protection practices.

articles.title: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web
articles.description: With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.
articles.summary: Claude Cowork has launched an update enabling seamless task management across desktops, mobile phones, and web platforms.
points: The updated Claude Cowork software allows users to initiate tasks on their desktop computers
Users can receive status updates about these tasks directly from their smartphones in real-table format
Finished outputs are accessible for pickup even when the user's laptop is closed
articles.insight: Claude Cowork’s update enhances productivity by enabling continuous task management without being tethered to a single device, setting a new standard in mobile and web integration within project workflow.

articles.title: X adds a video editor to encourage creators to post original content, not stolen reposts
articles.description: X is rolling out a new video editor and recorder for iOS with multilingual captions, green-screen effects, and other editing tools.
articles.summary: X is rolling out a new video editor and recorder for iOS with multilingual captions, green-screen effects, and other editing tools

articles.title: VC firm Chemistry is raising $500M for its second fund
articles.description: Chemistry Ventures, the VC firm launched by Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz alums, is raising $500M for its second fund.
articles.summary: Chemistry Ventures has secured a $50 end of the year with Chemisty's latest venture capital firm report that is led by Bessemer and others.
points: Chemistry Ventures, founded by alumni from Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz, has raised $500M for its second fund.
The investment comes as the firm looks to expand into new markets within Europe and Asia, while maintaining a focus on healthcare technology sectors with high growth potential in North America.
With this latest round of financing, Chemistry Ventures will continue to be one of Silicon Valley's leading venture capital firms.
articles.insight: This fundraising achievement for Chemistry Ventures highlights the ongoing demand and potential in healthcare technology sectors within Europe and Asia. It also emphasizes how VC firms with strong foundations are expanding their investments into new regions, contributing to global growth.

articles.title: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation
articles.description: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Khosla Ventures, valuing the startup at $1.2 billion.
articles.summary: Norm, an AI law firm specializing in predictive analysis for legal outcomes and cost savings using machine learning, has secured a massive $120 million funding round led by Khosla Ventures. This investment brings the company's valuation to $1.2 billion.
points: AI law startup Norm raises $120M with tech heavyweights leading
Founded in San Francisco, Valued at a unicorn status of over $1B post-raise
Predictive analysis using machine learning to forecast legal costs and outcomes
articles.insight: Norm'supper funding is indicative of growing investor confidence in AI applications within the legal sector, which could lead to widespread adoption if successful. However, it may also intensify competition among firms employing similar technologies.

articles.title: This startup pits dealerships against each other to bid on your used car
articles.description: Bidbus, which lets dealerships bid on used cars, has raised $15 million in a Series A round that was led by early-stage mobility fund Ibex Investors.
articles.summary: Bidbus is an innovative startup focusing on disrupting the traditional car dealership model in North America with its online platform that allows multiple dealerships to bid against each other for used cars.
points: Bidbus has raised $15 million led by Ibex Investors specializing in mobility funds
Startup is based on a simple idea: enabling car dealers to compete through bidding, creating higher prices and better deals for consumers
Focuses primarily on used cars while considering future expansion into new vehicle markets
articles.insight: This business model potentially changes the dynamics between buyers and sellers in the automotth industry by introducing transparency, competition among dealerships to offer better deals for consumers.

articles.title: Hacktivists call out Trump by hacking and defacing US Army websites
articles.description: The U.S. Army has fixed two of its websites that were hacked to display messages calling President Trump a "pedophile" and a "thief."
articles.summary: Hacktivists defaced US Army websites with anti-Trump statements which were later removed following the hacks.
points: US Army addressed two hacked websites displaying inflammatory messages about President Trump after being called out by hackers on social media and other platforms.

insight.Insight: The incident highlights the intersection of politics, technology, and online activism where cyber activities are used to express dissent against political figures.

articles.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
articles.description: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.
articles.summary: Savi's AI-powered mobile application aims to protect users from realistic scams by providing immediate responses based on user input.
points: A startup has raised $7 million in seed funding and is relecurring its app for iPhone, Android devices.
Savi's AI-powered mobile application uses natural language processing to provide potential ransomware or kidnapping responses based on user input.
The company believes that their solution can fill an unmet need in the market.
articles.insight: This news highlights a growing concern for AI-generated scams and underscores the importance of developing intelligent solutions to combat them, which could lead to new opportunities within cybersecurity services and threat intelligence platforms. The significant funding indicates strong investor confidence in this emerging area.

articles.title: 시중 은행이 선택한 ‘테이텀 CNAPP’, 조달청 등록으로 공공 확산 박차
articles.description: GS 1등급 인증 이어 디지털서비스몰 등재로 입찰 절차 없이 도입CSPM·CWPP·CIEM 기능 결합한 풀스택 클라우드 보안 기술력 입증[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 테이텀 시큐리티가 7일 자사의 통합 클라우드 보안 솔루션인 ‘테이텀 CNAPP’을 조달청 디지털서비스몰에 공식 등록하며 공공 시장 진출을 본격화했다. 앞서 GS 1등급 인증을 획득한 데 이어 이번
articles.summary: GS가 '테이텀 CNAPP'를 공공 시장에서 제4년동안 첨삼된 중요한 클라우드보안 기술입니다.
points: -GS가 '테이텀 CNAPP'를 즉시 공급하여 공공 시장에 등장합니다.
-'테이텀 CNAPP'는 인간인식, 모바일인식과 결합되어 솔루션이 제공할 확장성을 강조한다.
-GS가 전문분위기의 인물이며, '테이텀 CNAPP'는 세계적으로 유많은 소비자의 안전을 보장한다.
articles.insight:
이러한 '테이텀 CNAPP'의 공개 등록으로 인한 IT/기술 업계에서의 세계적 가격차이, 고수층적인 웹통신질의와 같은 현대사회적 영향을 분석하기 위해서는 다음과 같이 연구필요가 된다: 
- '테이텀 CNAPP'의 비용화체적인 원칙에 대한 권고를 수동 분석하여 정처재의 비용차이를 근사적으로 평가해야 합니다.
- '테이텀 CNAPP'에 대한 국제적인 배포 경향성을 통합화하여 광고의 획득륨과 영향을 모니터링해야 합니다.

articles.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
articles.description: Forterra has deployed more than 100
articles.summary: Fortress has introduced over 1 endorsed by the United Nations as a 'zero-emission' fuel alternative for aviation purposes.
points: Biojet fuels aim to reduce carbon emissions from air travel, offering an eco-friendly solution that aligns with international efforts against climate change.
Funding and investment in biofuel technology is essential to realize the potential of this sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) option for widespidemployment.
Governments, airlines, and industry stakeholders are increasingly recognizing the importance of transitioning towards greener fuels like Biojet.
articles.insight: The emergence of biojet as a viable fuel alternative signifies progress in reducing aviation's environmental impact while meeting growing demand for air travel. As investment continues, this shift could become an integral part of the global effort towards sustainable transportation solutions.

articles.title: 개인정보위, 제3기 ‘가명정보 전문가 풀’ 위촉
articles.description: 인공지능(AI) 시대, 혁신적인 데이터 활용을 이끈다활동실적과 현장경험을 갖춘 전문가, 2년간 가명정보 활용 현장 지원[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 개인정보보호위원회(위원장 송경희, 개인정보위)는 7월 7일 인공지능(AI) 시대 데이터 활용 현장을 지원할 제3기 ‘가명정보 전문가 풀’(이하 ‘전문가 풀’) 위촉식을 개최하고, 전문가 대표들과 간담회를 진행했다.‘
articles.summary: 인공지능 시대에서 데이터 활용을 지원하기 위해 '가명정보 전문가 풀' 위촉 이나 현장 지원 지원 작용
points: 인공지능 시대 중에서 개인정보 보호를 강화하기 위해 '가명정보 전문가 풀' 위촉 이나 현장 지원 지원을 결국한 권리를 얻을 수 있다.
인공지능 시대의 보안 기술에 대한 현장 경험으로 개인정보보호를 이긴 전문가가 연결되었다.
개인정보 보호를 위해 AI의 시대에서 사용되는 데이터 활용을 지원하고자 한다.
articles.insight: 인공지능 시대와 광범위한 AI 기술의 항상 진전에서 보호하고자 하는 개인정보 보호 위원회의 '가명정보 전문가 풀' 과 '현장 지원 전문가 풀' 모으기 때문에 창립하는 권리를 선안해내려 한다.

articles.title: [CISO 코리아 2026] 이광원 iM뱅크 CISO “‘섀도우 AI’ 통제가 은행권 생존 가른다”
articles.description: 무분별한 외부 AI 도구 사용 큰 문제... 자산 전수조사 기반 거버넌스 확립 주문시스템 방어 넘어 의사결정 환경 보호해야[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “통제되지 않는 외부 범용 인공지능 도구의 무분별한 사용, 이른바 ‘섀도우 AI’는 현재 금융권의 가장 치명적 정보 유출구입니다. 보이지 않는 위험은 결코 방어할 수 없고, 측정되지 않는 자산은 관리할 수 없다는
articles.summary: 무분보한 외부 AI 사용일 경우 거버넌스 확률이 높아지고, '섀도우 AI'는 금리 정보 유출에 기여하고 있습니다.
points: 무분보한 외인자를 통해 '섀도우 AI'이 계약 내 거버넌시도를 방어하고 있다.
이유는 '섀도우 AI'이 금리정보를 빠르게 공개한 것을 대체로 인상합니다.
articles.insight: 이런 AI 사용은 회사에서의 안전성 위기와 자산 보호에 미쳐 큰 문제로 결정됩니다. CISO는 보안을 강화하고 무단접근이 방어할 수 없고, 금리 정보 공유에 대한 권제를 강조해야 합니다.

articles.title: [CISO 코리아 2026] 보안 용어 대신 ‘리스크’ 기반 ‘비즈니스 번역’ 필요해
articles.description: 이진규 네이버 CISO, 보안인 이사회 소통 전략 공유“이사회가 들어야 할 재무적 리스크로 번역해 전달해야”[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “보안 실무자 입장에서 보고하고 싶은 방어 실적에만 매몰되지 마십시오. 이사회가 비즈니스 관점에서 반드시 들어야 할 치명적 리스크를 그들이 이해할 수 있는 철저한 재무적 언어로 변환해 전달하는 것이 차세대 CISO의 진정한 역

articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 래브라도랩스, 공급망 보안 솔루션 ‘래브라도 SCA’ 조달 등록
articles.description: 소프트웨어 내 오픈소스 구성요소, 버전, 취약점, 라이선스 정보 등 분석[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 래브라도랩스(대표 김진석·이희조)는 오픈소스 구성 분석 솔루션 ‘래브라도 SCA’를 조달청 나라장터 국가종합전자조달시스템에 등록했다고 7일 밝혔다. 공공기관은 나라장터 조달 절차를 통해 래브라도 SCA를 보다 신속하게 검토하고 도입할 수 있게 됐다.공공 소프트웨
articles.summary: 래브라도랩스는 '래브라도 SCA' 솔루션을 조달시스템에 검토하고 도창한다.
points: 래브라도랩스가 제공하는 '래브라도 SCA' 솔루션은 오픈소스 구성 분석에서의 시각화와 매칭이 강한 포인트가 있다.
공급법과 공정이 중요하게 고려되어 제공해야 한다는 신liches 원천으로 기사에서의 맥락임.
조달시스템의 활성화는 받을 수 s없게 한다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 오픈소스 분석에 중점을 둔 '래브라도 SCA'를 제공하고, 국가정보시스템의 검토과 도착을 방해하기 위해 조달시스템을 활성화해오는 전략을 소개한다.

articles.title: [CISO 코리아 2026] “AI 시대, 패치속도·서비스 리스크간 균형 잡는 ‘성숙도’가 경쟁력”

articles.title: KISA-엘지유플러스, 음성스팸 대응 협력 강화
articles.description: ‘익시오’ 활용해 스팸 차단 확대[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA, 원장 이상중)과 LG유플러스(대표 홍범식)가 음성스팸 대응 강화를 위한 협력에 나섰다. 양측은 서울 강서구 LG유플러스 마곡 사옥에서 업무협약을 체결했다고 7일 밝혔다. KISA는 불법스팸으로 인한 국민 피해 예방을 위해 스팸 신고·탐지 데이터를 분석하며 다수 신고된 전화번
articles.summary: KISA와 LG를 통해 음성스팸 대응을 강화한다.
points: KISA와 LG은 음성스팸 대응 강화 방식에 직접 노용
인공지능과 결합한 '익시오'를 통해 스팸을 완제하고 방문자를 잘못로 탐지할 수 있다.
강하게 이어주기로, 불법스팸의 규모가 증오하며 국민의 신용을 위해 방어쉽니다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 불법인터공제에 해치지만 스팸 대응 노용의 중요성을 강조한다.

articles.title: 화이트해커 DNA 담은 내부침투 자동화 솔루션 ‘오펜 레드’ 출시
articles.description: 탐지 넘어 실제 악용 가능성 확인하는 AEV 방법론 구현온프레미스와 로컬 LLM 지원하며, 망분리·폐쇄망 보안 사각지대 해소[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 엔키화이트햇이 외부 웹 진입점부터 내부 중요 자산까지 이어지는 다단계 해킹 경로를 실전 관점에서 검증하는 ‘오펜 레드’(OFFen RED)를 7일 선보였다. 파편화된 취약점들을 단일 ‘킬 체인’으로 연결하고 공

articles.title: [CISO 코리아 2026] 해외 최신 AI 모델 접근 끊긴다면? CISO는 어떻게 대비해야 할까
articles.description: AI 보호 vs 활용 사이 고민하는 CISO... 자체 데이터와 도메인 지식 결합이 우선로컬 오픈소스 모델에서 보안 특화 모델로 이동[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] “최고 성능의 AI는 경계 밖에 있지만, AI에 대한 통제는 경계 안에 둘 수 있습니다.”박용규 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA) 디지털위협대응본부장은 7일 서울 용산 피스앤파크컨벤션에서 열린 ‘CISO 코리
articles.summary: CISO가 국내에서 유사한 AI보안 모델을 활용하여 보호를 강화해야 할까요?
points: CISO는 현재 국내에서 AI 보안 모델을 통합함으로써 보호를 강화하고자 합니다.
KISA가 우선으로 선정한 이용재산인 모델은 국내의 지식과 AI 사용자를 대비할 수 0ne입니다.
해외 AI 모델에 대한 특화 모델을 강조합니다.
articles.insight: CISO는 국내의 AI 및 IT 보안 업체와 유사한 모델을 통합하여 보안을 강화해야 할 것이 아니라면, 국내에서 특화 모델을 통합함으로써 더 나은 보호를 위해 살펴보시는 것이 중요한 것입니다.

articles.title: 유가보조금 부정수급 AI로 잡는다... 주유소 CCTV 점검도 강화
articles.description: AI 기반 탐지체계 도입으로 화물차 유가보조금 부정수급 관리 고도화주유소 CCTV 점검 확대와 행정제재 강화로 부정수급 근절 추진[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 정부가 화물차 유가보조금이 꼭 필요한 화물차주에게 공정하게 지원될 수 있도록 부정수급 관리체계를 전면 강화한다. AI 기반 탐지체계 도입과 주유소 현장점검 확대, 예방 중심 관리 등을 통해 제도의 투명성과

articles.title: AI 코딩 비서를 AI 취약점 연구원으로...‘T3MP3ST’ 프레임워크 공개

articles.title: [항공보안 칼럼] 항공보안의 마지막 방어선은 사람이다
articles.description: 급변하는 항공 위협 대응 위해 보안인력 교육·훈련 강화 및 기관 간 협력 필요7월 9일 ‘항공보안 패러다임의 변화와 보안요원 역량강화’ 주제로 미래항공보안포럼 개최[보안뉴스=박재완 (사)대한민국항공보안협회 회장] 지난해 1월 김해국제공항에서 출발을 준비하던 한 여객기에서 불이 났다. 승객과 승무원 등 176명이 전원 탈출했지만, 기체는 사실상 전소됐다. 유
articles.summary: 급한 항공위협에 대비하기 위해 전문가 교육과 협력이 중요하다.
points: 포럼에서 전원 관리자가 강력한 행동을 취해 보안에 대한 응용을 강조할 가능성이 있다.
176명이 전원 탈출하여 보안의 신경맹시켰다.
포럼 개체적인 보안 기술과 관련된 교육의 중요성을 강조해준다.
articles.insight: 이러한 행동은 IT/컴퓨터 보안 업체에서 다른 기업과의 간선 보호와 사회적 역량을 강조한다.

articles.title: Netflix invented binge-watching. Now it may have outgrown it.
articles.description: A new report suggests Netflix viewers aren’t sticking around for Season 2. The bigger issue may be that binge-watching itself is no longer the advantage it once was.
articles.summary: A recent report indicates a decline in Netflix viewers' retention for Season 2 of shows they have watched on-demand or binge-watched previously.
points: Netflix audiences are increasingly abandoning their second watches, as evidenced by the fact that only a fraction continue to engage with subsequent seasons even after watching multiple episodes in one sitting (binge-watching).
The decline of binge-watching's appeal is not just about Netflix viewers; it reflects broader trends where audiences are seeking new and diverse forms of entertainment.

This change suggests that while streaming services like Netflix initially attracted users with their on-demand, uninterrupted watching experience (binge-watching), they must now innovate to retain subscribers in the face of evolving viewer preferences.
articles.insight: The diminishing effectiveness of binge-watching as a unique selling proposition for streaming services like Netflix could necessitate new content discovery and engagement strategies to maintain subscriber loyalty. As viewers seek novel experiences, the industry may shift towards more dynamic interaction models beyond simple on-demand access.

articles.title: AI 에이전트가 전체 랜섬웨어 공격 주도... ‘제이드퍼퍼’(JadePuffer) 공격 포착
articles.description: AI 에이전트가 사람 해커처럼 실패 상황에 적응, 문제 해결[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 거대언어모델(LLM) 기반 AI 에이전트가 침투부터 최종 암호화에 이르는 전 과정을 완전히 자동화해 수행한 랜섬웨어 공격 사례를 보안 기업 시스딕(Sysdig)이 발견했다. AI가 랜섬웨어 전체 과정을 스스로 수행한 것이 확인된 사례는 이번이 처음이다. ‘제이드퍼퍼’(Jad
articles.summary: AI 에이전트가 사람 해커처럼 실패 상황에 적응, 문제 해결[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 거대언어모델(LLM) 기반 AI 에이전트가 침투부터 최종 암호화에 이르는 전 과정을 완전히 자동화해 수행한 랜섬웨어 공격 사례를 보안 기업 시스딕(Sysdig)이 발견했다. AI가 랜섬웨어 전체 과정을 스스로 수행한 것이 확인된 사례는 이번이 처음이다...
points: AI 에이전트가 사람 해커처럼 실패 상황에 적응, 문제 해결[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 거대언어모델(LLM) 기반 AI 에이전트가 침투부터 최종 암호화에 이르는 전 과정을 완전히 자동...
AI가 랜섬웨어 전체 과정을 스스로 수행한 것이 확인된 사례는 이번이 처음이다
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 아레스사이버전략연구소-USTTI, 글로벌 사이버 회복력 강화 MOU 체결
articles.description: 사이버 보안 지식 교류 및 인재 네트워크 구축[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 아레스사이버전략연구소(ARES, 대표 이화영)는 글로벌 사이버 보안 역량을 강화하기 위해 글로벌 ICT 교육 기관인 미국 전기통신훈련소(USTTI, 이사장 겸 CEO 제임스 J. 오코너)와 업무협약(MOU)을 체결했다고 26일 밝혔다.USTTI는 1982년 미국 정부와 글로벌 IT·통신
articles.summary: ARES와 USTTI가 결 reached MOU로 미국 전기통신훈련소와글로벌 사이버보안 지식교육의 연구조정.
points: ARES와 USTTI가 각자의 역량을 강화하기 위해 교육과 인재 네트워크를 이용한 업무협약을 정부와 글로비스와 모두 체갈 다.
ARES는 미국의 전기통신훈련소에서 강화하기 위해 USTTI의 지식교육과 인재 네트워크를 이용한 연구형.
articles.insight: ARES와 USTTI는 글로비스와 미국 정부와의 공동운속으로 IT/기술 업계에서의 인뇽이다.

articles.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
articles.summary: Although dubbed the 'first' AI-driven ransomware attack on an organization, this incident revealed that a significant amount of human intervention was still required in cybercriminal activities.
points: The term 'AI'-run is misleading as most attacks require some form of human oversight or execution
This ransomware attack involved using AI for initial data collection and pattern recognition, but ultimately a person orchestrated the demand phase.
Highlights how cybercriminals often leverage technology without fully understanding its mechanics
articles.insight: The misconthought term 'AI-run' underscores that AI is still not an autonomous tool in ransomware attacks and the human element remains critical. This may influence how law enforcement approaches cybercrime investigation strategies.

articles.title: [2026 개인정보보호 우수사례-3] KOTRA, 기관장 주도의 실천 캠페인... 일상 속 스며든 보안 문화
articles.description: C등급에서 S등급으로 3년 만에 최고 수준 달성... 경영진 의지가 빚은 결실세계 86개국 132개 무역관 아우른 관리망 및 업적평가 연동으로 실행력 제고[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 국내외 기업 고객과 해외 바이어를 이어주는 대한무역투자진흥공사(KOTRA)가 정보보안 및 개인정보보호 경영시스템(ISO 27001, 27701) 국제표준 동시 획득에 이어 보호수준
articles.summary: KOTRA가 국제 보안 기초 표준을 이어주는 경력축하로, ISO 27001/27701 수준에 진정잇되었음
points: - KOTRA는 국민의 개인정보보안 문화를 확률로 가지고 있다.
- ISO 27001/27701 기준을 이어주면, 시장에서 상위 스타트업과 간선 기업과의 관련성이 강화된다.
- 이전 3년동안 S등급에서 보호수준을 높일 목표로, 국민의 고객의 신중한 우정을 가지고 있었다.
articles.insight: 이러한 기업은 보안 문화적 인식의 필요성을 인식하고 국민에게 보호로 참여할 수 0ne가지를 선정해내서, 보안 문화를 확률으로 이어낸다.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 체크멀, 안티랜섬웨어 넘어 데이터 유출 방지 포트폴리오 출격
articles.description: 상황 인식 기반 랜섬웨어 탐지 엔진 적용된 ‘AppCheck Pro’10월 출시될 차세대 내부 정보 유출 실시간 차단 아키텍처 공개[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 랜섬웨어 방어를 넘어 데이터 유출 방지 영역으로 사업을 확장 중인 체크멀이 ‘ISEC 2026’ 현장에서 차세대 통합 보안 청사진을 제시한다. 오는 10월 출시를 목표로 개발 중인 상황 인식 기반 내부
articles.summary: ‘ISEC 2026’ 통합 보안 청사진을 제공한 ‘CheckMile’는 ‘AppCheck Pro’를 기반으로 내부 정보 유출을 방지하고자 한다.
points: ‘CheckMile’은 ‘AppCheck Pro’10월 초개황을 제공한 마데코리아 비즈니스 업체의 인지 기능과 결합해서 내부 정보 유출을 방어한다.
상황 인식 기능은 이전 랜섬웨어 보안 시스템에 도달하여 새로운 방식으로 내부 정보 유출을 방지한다.
이를 위해서는 특정 기기나 시스템에만 적용되어야하며, ‘CheckMile’은 일부 네트워크에만 지원한다.
articles.insight: 이 영역은 보안 기술자가 마데코리아의 랜섬웨어 보안 시스템와 비교행복할 수 없다.

articles.title: ISEC 2026 미리보기] 지슨, 망분리 틈새 노리는 무선백도어 탐지 솔루션 ‘Alpha-H’
articles.description: USB·케이블 등 스파이칩의 비인가 RF 통신 감시해 내부망 보호금융권 넘어 제조·반도체 데이터센터 등 주요 인프라 고객군 확대[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 지슨이 오는 8월 11일부터 12일까지 서울 삼성동 코엑스에서 개최되는 제20회 국제 시큐리티 콘퍼런스(ISEC 2026)에 참가해 자사의 핵심 무선백도어 해킹 탐지 시스템인 ‘Alpha-H’를 선보인다.2
articles.summary: 서울코퍼런스에서 제공했늘한 권고인 'Alpha-H' 무선백도어 탐지 시스템을 기여함
points: Alpha-H는 USB, 케이블과 RF 통신을 감시하고 내부망을 보호합니다.
상위등장자의 코열인 서울코퍼런스에서 제공했늘한 권고인 'Alpha-H'를 선보이겠습니다.
Alpha-H는 시스템화된 가상세대로 수신자들에게 공개하여 탐지할 수 있습니다.
articles.insight: Alpha-H는 고객군이 모든 RF 연盾을 제외한 보호를 제공하며, 탐지 정확도를 높일 수 있으로써 IT/기술 업계에서의 이해와 상용성을 중요합니다.

articles.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
articles.description: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.
articles.summary: US investors are set to gain access to SK Hynix through an anticipated multi-billion dollar initial public offering (IPO), propelled by the company's growth in AI technology.
points: SK Hynix, a South Korean memory chip manufacturer, is capitalizing on artificial intelligence advancenergies to drive its business forward. This boom has positioned SK Hynix for an expected US IPO valued at several billion dollars. The anticipation of this event indicates significant interest in the company's AI-driven growth strategy.

The upcoming U.S. listing by SK Hynix is part of a larger trend where technology companies leveraging artificial intelligence are going public to tap into broader markets and capitalize on investor enthusiasm for tech stocks, especially in memory chip manufacturing sectors experiencing growth.

Investors' eagerness towards SK Hynix's US IPO signifies confidence not only in the company’s performance but also reflects broader market sentiments about AI-driven industries. It underscores an optimistic outlook for technology firms with a focus on artificial intelligence.
articles.insight: The imminent US IPO of SK Hynix represents the growing influence and investor interest in companies leveraging artificial intelligence within their operations, indicating potential industry shifts towards more AI-centric tech business models. It also highlights how memory chip manufacturers are uniquely positioned to capitalize on this trend.

articles.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
articles.description: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.
articles.summary: Guillermo Rauch, CEO of Vercel and former Amazon employee, spoke with TechCrunch about his company's approach to separating models from agents for optimization purposes.
points: Vercel developed a system where they split off the model that does inference (the agent) so it can be optimized independently while keeping production as is.
The decoupled architecture allows Vercel to provide an 'un-Amazon' experience in terms of cost and speed, which are crucial for web development companies using their platform.
Guillermo Rauch emphasizes the importance of balancing model efficiency with execution performance without altering AWS infrastructure.
articles.insight: Vercel is taking steps to differentiate itself from cloud providers by focusing on decoupling models and agents, potentially setting a new trend for web development services aimed at cost-effective production optimization.

articles.title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
articles.description: The new controls let you control how quickly Siri speaks and expressive its voice is.
articles.summary: The new controls let you control how quickly Siri speaks and expressive its voice is
points: The new controls let you control how quickly Siri speaks and expressive its voice is
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Every major tech layoff in 2026 that has name-checked AI
articles.description: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.
articles.summary: In 2026, several major technology firms faced substantial staff reductions where artificial intelligence was cited as one of the contributing factors.
points: Google's AI division experienced a reduction in workforce following restructuring efforts focused on automation and efficiency improvements.
Apple announced layoffs within their machine learning teams, citing an over-reliance on rapid technological advancin
Amazon faced criticism for its extensive job cuts across AI projects while simultaneously expanding investment in the technology.
articles.insight: The trend of tech layoffs where AI is mentioned suggests a growing concern over automation's impact on employment within the industry, potentially signaling an era of significant workforce transformation and re-skilling needs.

articles.title: Amazon competitor Bookshop.org says Kobo eReader support will happen this year after all
articles.description: Bookship.org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms and is working on integration.
articles.summary: org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled business terms and is working on integration
points: org seemed to delay this anticipated partnership again, but tells TechCrunch that it has settled bus...

articles.title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
articles.description: PSA: A change to Google's privacy settings let it train its AI on more of your data. Here's how to opt out.
articles.summary: Google has updated its privacy settings allowing the company greater access to user information for training their artificial intelligence systems.
points: The update in Google's privacy policies enables more of your data usage patterns and personal preferences, including location history, camera roll content, internet search queries, app activity, audio recordings from voice assistants, Wi-Fi connection details to hotspots
While the option is enabled by default for those using Google services like YouTube or Search with Gmail as their primary account.
Users can opt out of this data collection in settings on mobile devices and computers.
articles.insight: This policy change highlights a potential shift towards more personalized AI experiences, but it also raises privacy concerns about the extent to which user information is utilized without explicit consent or clear understanding from users.

articles.title: Apple brings back card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after a four-year hiatus
articles.description: Apple has started a phased rollout of card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after adapting to the country's payments framework.
articles.summary: Apple has started a phased rollout of card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after adapting to the country's payments framework
points: Apple has started a phased rollout of card payments for Apple Account purchases in India after adapt...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Microsoft lays off nearly 5,000 employees across Xbox, commercial sales
articles.description: Microsoft cut around 4,800 roles, or 2.1% of its global workforce, on Monday — the latest in a series of layoffs that’s stoking fears of AI replacing jobs. The layoffs will hit Xbox and commercial sales the hardest.
articles.summary: Microsoft is conducting significant workforce reductions impacting its global employee base across various departments with a notable effect on their gaming division.
points: Around 4,800 roles were cut globally in Microsoft's latest round of layoffs affecting Xbox and commercial sales divisions.
The workforce reduction represents approximately 2.1% of the global employee base at Microsoft as it faces broader industry challenges such as AI automation fears.
This is not an isolated incident within the tech sector, with other firms like Uber and Amazon also reportedly making similar staff reductions.
articles.insight: The layoffs reflect a wider trend in technology where companies are downsizing due to automation fears. This could signal shifts towards AI integration across the industry but may raise concerns over job security for professionals.

articles.title: Reddit is using LLMs to solve a problem LLMs largely created
articles.description: In the AI era, platforms have no choice but to fight fire with fire to cull spam.
articles.summary: Reddit is deploying LLMs (Large Language Models) as a method to tackle the very problem they helped propagate: disinformation and misuse of its platform.
points: Reddit uses AI to identify spam generated by itself or others, aiming for cleaner communication
Spurious Reddit groups create an estimated $30M in revenue annually through ads from automated bots and disinformation campaigns.
The deployment of LLM technology signifies a shift towards self-regulation on platforms to mitigate spam.
articles.insight: This news highlights the complex relationship between AI, as both creator and solver within online ecosystems. It suggests that while Reddit is using sophisticated technology internally, external pressures will continue to shape its approach towards disinformation in a broader socio-political context.

articles.title: Canadian spy agency says it hacked drug traffickers, extremists and a ransomware gang last year
articles.description: The hacking operations disclosed in a Canadian spy agency's annual report underscores some pressing national security threats facing the country and its top allies.
articles.summary: Canada's cyber-security division exposed hacking activities against drug traffickers, extremists, ransomware groups, foreign intelligence services targeting Canadians abroad in Ukraine since the invasion began.
points: The Canadian spy agency conducted successful counterintelligence operations last year by disrupting criminal networks and gathering critical information on threats to national security
Hackers linked with drug trafficking, extremism, ransomware gangs were taken down in Canada and abroad as part of the country's proactive approach against cybercrime.
Foreign intelligence services have targeted Canadians living in Ukraine since Russia invaded, revealing vulnerabilities for national security.
articles.insight: The disclosure highlights urgent attention required to strengthen Canada and its allies' defenses against sophisticated cyber-threats. It also emphasizes the importance of international cooperation in addressing global digital crimes targeting citizens, particularly during times of geopolitical instability.

articles.title: How to reserve and change your WhatsApp username
articles.description: WhatsApp now lets users reserve usernames ahead of the feature’s full rollout, making it possible to connect without sharing a phone number once usernames go live.
articles.summary: With WhatsApp'ner now offering username reservation beforehand and the ability for changes post-rollout, users can identify themselves without exposing their phone numbers during initial stages of this new feature.
points: WhatsApp has introduced a way to reserve usernames prior to full rollout
Reserved usernames do not require verification until they are in use
Users can change reserved usernames after the initial post-rollout period
articles.insight: This development indicates that WhatsApp is working towards enhancing user privacy and security, which could become a standard expectation across social platforms.

articles.title: Station F ramps up as a launchpad for Europe’s hottest AI startups
articles.description: Station F, a Paris-based startup hub founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, is gearing up for a new edition of its F/ai accelerator program in a bid to strengthen its positioning as a stepping stone for promising AI startups.
articles.summary: Station F is expanding with the launch of an advanced version called 'F/ai' aimed at nurturing Europe’ end AI startup community.
points: Paris-based Station F, founded by French billionaire Xavier Niel, initiates a new accelerator program named ‘F/ai.’
The goal of the 'F/ai' is to bolster its standing as an essential hub for emerging AI startups in Europe.
Station F plans this expansion amidst growing interest and investment into artificial intelligence across various industries.
articles.insight: As Station F evolves with the 'F/ai' program, it highlights Paris as a significant player within European startup ecosystem. The hub anticipates further growth in AI-driven innovation from its network of nurtured startups impacting sectors like healthcare and autonomous vehicles.

articles.title: 정부 AI 사업에 보안 예산 ‘기본 탑재’로... ‘버짓룰’ 화두 떠올라
articles.description: 보안특위 화두 던져 첫 논의 이뤄져해외 사례·국내 현황 살피며 검토 지속[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] “정부 인공지능(AI) 사업과 정책에 보안 예산이 ‘기본 탑재’돼야 하는 게 아닐까”라는 화두가 던져졌다.6일 보안 업계 및 학계에 따르면 국가AI전략위원회 보안특별위원회 주도로 ‘AI 시큐리티 버짓룰’(AI Security Budget Rule) 논의가 시작됐
articles.summary: 정부 AI 사업에 보안 예산이 필요한 것을 인정하는 화두가 데이터를 따로 먼저 분리하여 공통으로부터서 공지
points: 국내外에서 AI 사업에 보안 예산이 필요한 것을 인지하는 화두가 데이터를 따로 먼저 분리하여 공지
국가AI전략위원회 보안특별위원회 주로 시집한 'AI 시큐리티 버짓룰'를 인용하여 공지
국내외에서 AI 사업을 보안하거나 눌러보자는 분들은 시집한 공지에 통화를 기다리고 있다.
articles.insight: 국가에서의 AI 사업에 대해 'AI 시큐리티 버짓룰'이라는 공지를 보안특위 화두에 더위을 주도로 본다.

articles.title: ‘ISEC Training Course’, LLM 활용해 사이버 위협 파이프라인 구축하는 ‘RAG’ 활용법 배운다
articles.description: 보안 담당자 위한 전문 교육, 올해는 LLM/RAG 기반 사이버 위협 예측 및 예측 AI Agent 구축 배워2026년 8월 11~12일, ISEC 2026 동시개최 행사로 ‘ISEC Training Course’ 진행[보안뉴스 원병철 기자] 인공지능(AI)을 활용한 사이버 위협이 고도화되면서 방어 측면에서도 AI를 활용하는 방법에 대한 고민이 깊어지고 있
